accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context (SSA administers Title II disability insurance; prior expiration 2021-2022; Section 234 is demonstration authority).

no_hallucinations.why: Contextual additions (SSA as administrator, prior lapse) are accurate and not fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose of reauthorizing disability insurance demonstration project authority under Title II.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes amendments to the Social Security Act's Section 234 and 201(k) demonstration authority provisions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the new participant-income-protection condition and the trust fund determination by the Commissioner.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the January 1, 2027 effective date and the 2030/2031 termination dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all operative provisions: timeline extension, waiver/notice/metrics, funding source, income protection, and technical amendments.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized with clear structure and internally consistent.

concise.why: Free of padding and filler while covering all key points.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies SSA, the Commissioner, the two trust funds, Ways and Means Committee, and the sponsor.

correct_figures.why: All dates (2030, 2031, 2027), the 90-to-120-day change, and introduction/report dates match the bill.
